data.title: First Solar, NextEra, Enphase: What Post-Election Scenarios Could Mean For Renewable Powerhouses
data.description: Stocks in renewable energy companies like First Solar, NextEra, and Enphase could see a boost post-election, depending on the outcome.

data.title: Fuji Soft Board Chooses KKR Bid Despite Higher Offer From Bain Capital: Report
data.description: Fuji Soft bord reportedly accepts KKR's $3.72B bid over Bain's higher offer. Founder urges support for Bain's bid despite board's backing of KKR.

data.title: Tech Bull Says Investors Should Take 'Advantage' Of Amazon Stock's 'Period Of Relative Underperformance' Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: This is amid ongoing discussions about initiatives like Project Kuiper and associated costs.

data.title: American Express Q3 Earnings: Profit Beats Estimate, Card Spending Grows, Revises Annual Outlook
data.description: Amex Q2 revenue misses estimate, stock initially rises but gives up gains. Higher net interest income, spending, and fees drive increase. EPS beats estimate. Expenses and credit losses up. FY24 outlook lowered due to inflation, higher rates. Multiple downgrades in Oct. AXP stock up 89% in 1 year.

data.title: Procter & Gamble's Mixed Bag Q1: EPS Exceeds Estimates, Reaffirms Growth Outlook & More
data.description: PG shares up after reporting Q1 FY25 sales of $21.74B, missing consensus estimate. Organic sales grew 2%, adjusted EPS beat. Segment sales varied.
